headline: The Trade Desk outlook clouded by second-half growth concerns, says Jefferies
summary: The Trade Desk (NASDAQ:TTD) is going into its first quarter earnings report with a cautious outlook from Jefferies, with analysts warning that further estimate reductions may be ahead despite the potential for a near-term revenue beat. The analysts expect Q1 revenue to come in roughly in line...

headline: Jefferies warns on Trade Desk into Q1 earnings
summary: Investing.com -- Jefferies urged caution on Trade Desk in a note on Thursday ahead of the company’s first-quarter earnings, warning that consensus revenue expectations for the second half of 2026 look "overly aggressive" and that further estimate cuts are likely in store.

headline: 2 Oversold Stocks Primed to Rebound and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: Hitting a new 52-week low can be a pivotal moment for any stock. These floors often mark either the beginning of a turnaround story or confirmation that a company faces serious headwinds.

headline: The Trade Desk Stock Rises As Ad-Tech Rebound Builds
summary: Trade Desk Inc (NASDAQ: TTD) shares are trading higher on Thursday as traders lean back into higher-beta growth names and ad-tech after a bounce off multi-year lows.
